requirement_topic.en: Battery-Specific Horizontal Regulation — Labelling, Carbon Footprint and Producer Responsibility
requirement_topic.zh: 电池专项横向法规——标签、碳足迹及生产者责任
requirement_topic.zht: 電池專項橫向法規——標籤、碳足跡及生產者責任

summary.en: Argentina has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation equivalent to Regulation (EU) 2023/1542. There is no national battery passport, no mandatory carbon footprint declaration, no recycled-content threshold, and no battery-specific extended producer responsibility (EPR) scheme imposed on importers of portable lithium batteries at the federal level. Instead, lithium batteries and power banks are governed through (1) the Secretaria de Comercio mandatory electrical-safety certification regime (Resolucion 169/2018 and successors) that yields the S-safety mark, and (2) general mandatory energy-efficiency labelling for appliances administered by the Secretaria de Energia where the product falls within a labelled category. Waste-battery handling is addressed by general environmental and hazardous-waste law (Ley 24.051 on hazardous waste, plus provincial regulations and the City of Buenos Aires battery-collection rules), not by a single national EPR statute for battery producers. Importers must clear products through ANMAC/Aduana with the in-country importer (CUIT) acting as the responsible economic party.
summary.zh: 阿根廷没有等同于法规（EU）2023/1542的欧盟式横向电池法规。在联邦层面，不存在国家电池护照、强制碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛，也没有针对便携式锂电池进口商的电池专项生产者延伸责任（EPR）制度。锂电池及移动电源通过以下方式管理：（1）贸易秘书处强制电气安全认证制度（Resolucion 169/2018及后续法规），据此获得S安全标志；（2）由能源秘书处管理的家电强制能效标签（当产品属于标签类别时）。废旧电池处理由一般环境与危险废物法律规范（关于危险废物的Ley 24.051，加上各省法规及布宜诺斯艾利斯市电池回收规则），而非由单一国家级电池生产者EPR法规规范。进口须由持有CUIT的在地进口商作为责任经济方，经ANMAC/海关清关。
summary.zht: 阿根廷沒有等同於法規（EU）2023/1542的歐盟式橫向電池法規。在聯邦層面，不存在國家電池護照、強制碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻，也沒有針對便攜式鋰電池進口商的電池專項生產者延伸責任（EPR）制度。鋰電池及行動電源透過以下方式管理：（1）貿易秘書處強制電氣安全認證制度（Resolucion 169/2018及後續法規），據此獲得S安全標誌；（2）由能源秘書處管理的家電強制能效標籤（當產品屬於標籤類別時）。廢舊電池處理由一般環境與危險廢物法律規範（關於危險廢物的Ley 24.051，加上各省法規及布宜諾斯艾利斯市電池回收規則），而非由單一國家級電池生產者EPR法規規範。進口須由持有CUIT的在地進口商作為責任經濟方，經ANMAC/海關清關。

standards_or_laws: Resolucion 169/2018 (ex-Secretaria de Comercio) and successors — mandatory electrical-safety certification and S-safety mark for low-voltage electrical equipment
Ley 24.051 — Hazardous Waste (Residuos Peligrosos) — general framework covering waste-battery handling
Energy-efficiency labelling regime administered by the Secretaria de Energia — mandatory for appliance categories in scope

summary.en: China does not have a single horizontal battery regulation either. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety), customs import/export declaration, and mandatory CCC certification for certain rechargeable battery categories under the CNCA catalogue. China's domestic producer-responsibility duties for waste batteries arise under the Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law and the 2021 battery-recycling administrative measures, but these are domestic obligations and differ structurally from any per-country importer EPR scheme. There is no Chinese battery passport or carbon-footprint declaration law for exporters.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有单一横向电池法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海关进出口申报约束，部分可充电电池类别还须依据CNCA目录取得强制性CCC认证。中国废旧电池的国内生产者责任源于《固体废物污染环境防治法》及2021年电池回收管理办法，但属国内义务，在结构上与任何按国别的进口商EPR制度存在差异。中国没有面向出口商的电池护照或碳足迹声明法律。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有單一橫向電池法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海關進出口申報約束，部分可充電電池類別還須依據CNCA目錄取得強制性CCC認證。中國廢舊電池的國內生產者責任源於《固體廢物污染環境防治法》及2021年電池回收管理辦法，但屬國內義務，在結構上與任何按國別的進口商EPR制度存在差異。中國沒有面向出口商的電池護照或碳足跡聲明法律。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) — domestic producer-responsibility framework
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — applicable to certain rechargeable battery categories

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Argentina imposes no battery passport, no carbon-footprint declaration, no recycled-content threshold, and no battery-specific importer EPR statute — so the structural documentation burden of the EU Battery Regulation does not exist here. The practical Argentine gap for a Chinese exporter is therefore narrower and concrete: (1) the product must obtain the Secretaria de Comercio electrical-safety certification and bear the S-mark where in scope; (2) where the product falls in a labelled appliance category, mandatory energy-efficiency labelling applies; (3) waste-battery obligations are met at importer/distributor level under general hazardous-waste and provincial rules rather than a federal producer-registration scheme. A Chinese GB 31241 report and domestic recycling compliance do not substitute for these Argentine steps.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，阿根廷不设电池护照、不设碳足迹声明、不设再生材料含量门槛，也没有电池专项进口商EPR法规——因此欧盟电池法规的结构性文件负担在此并不存在。中国出口商在阿根廷面临的实际差距更窄且具体：（1）在适用范围内，产品须取得贸易秘书处电气安全认证并加贴S标志；（2）当产品属于标签类家电类别时，须适用强制能效标签；（3）废旧电池义务在进口商/分销商层面依据一般危险废物及各省法规履行，而非联邦生产者注册制度。中国GB 31241报告及国内回收合规不能替代上述阿根廷步骤。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，阿根廷不設電池護照、不設碳足跡聲明、不設再生材料含量門檻，也沒有電池專項進口商EPR法規——因此歐盟電池法規的結構性文件負擔在此並不存在。中國出口商在阿根廷面臨的實際差距更窄且具體：（1）在適用範圍內，產品須取得貿易秘書處電氣安全認證並加貼S標誌；（2）當產品屬於標籤類家電類別時，須適用強制能效標籤；（3）廢舊電池義務在進口商/分銷商層面依據一般危險廢物及各省法規履行，而非聯邦生產者註冊制度。中國GB 31241報告及國內回收合規不能替代上述阿根廷步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Partly applicable — Argentina has NO EU-style horizontal battery regulation (no battery passport, carbon footprint, recycled-content, or federal battery-EPR scheme); the binding obligations are the Secretaria de Comercio S-mark electrical-safety certification where in scope, energy-efficiency labelling for in-scope appliance categories, and general hazardous-waste rules for waste batteries
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — GB 31241 safety compliance, customs declaration, and CCC (where listed) are domestic export requirements; no battery passport, carbon footprint, or exporter due-diligence law applies under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina does not operate an EU-style horizontal battery regulation, so Chinese exporters face no battery-passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content, or federal battery-EPR obligation. The real Argentine burden is the Secretaria de Comercio electrical-safety certification and S-mark (where in scope), energy-efficiency labelling for in-scope appliance categories, and importer-level compliance with general hazardous-waste rules. None of these is satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or domestic recycling compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷不实行欧盟式横向电池法规，故中国出口商无电池护照、碳足迹、再生材料含量或联邦电池EPR义务。阿根廷的实际负担为贸易秘书处电气安全认证及S标志（适用范围内）、属于范围内家电类别的能效标签，以及进口商层面对一般危险废物规则的遵守。上述均无法由中国GB 31241或国内回收合规满足。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷不實行歐盟式橫向電池法規，故中國出口商無電池護照、碳足跡、再生材料含量或聯邦電池EPR義務。阿根廷的實際負擔為貿易秘書處電氣安全認證及S標誌（適用範圍內）、屬於範圍內家電類別的能效標籤，以及進口商層面對一般危險廢物規則的遵守。上述均無法由中國GB 31241或國內回收合規滿足。

source.publisher: Gobierno de Argentina — Seguridad Electrica (Secretaria de Comercio / Secretaria de Industria y Desarrollo Productivo)
